figures.caption: Fig. 1: Comparison of evolution paradigms in agentic recommender systems. The left part shows the standard ARS pipeline with the Reflexion paradigm. The right part compares three RL paradigms.
TABLE III: Recommendation performance comparison across datasets. The best result in each dataset column is highlighted in bold, and the second-best result is underlined.
TABLE IV: User simulation performance comparison across datasets. The best result in each dataset column is highlighted in bold, and the second-best result is underlined.
Fig. 2: The framework of our CoARS.
